Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "MIAMICHASE-1000-8000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $1000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Miami Chase.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $1000 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Sets $22 to $00 so that the title screen displays correctly (i.e. with a black blackground)
Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $BF28. However the true start address is $8000.
